heroSubtitle: A puzzle game to learn Chinese.
storyParagraph1: Once a living paradise, the island is now buried in smog, waste, and silence. Rivers clog, forests fall silent, and its sky no longer remembers its glow.
storyParagraph2: When all seems lost, two young dragon siblings armed with wit, courage, and the power of puzzles begin a mission to heal a broken world piece by piece.
previewPrompt: Will you shine the light to their victory?
learnSectionText: Learn new skills, every solved puzzle restores life, and every choice brings the island one step closer to rebirth.
signupSubheadline: Sign up for chapter drops, and launch rewards
signupPrivacy: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe anytime.
